items.name: cinematic-forest-3d
items.title: Cinematic Forest 3D · P0
items.description: Real-time editable 3D world with optimized PBR geometry, terrain, HDR environment, reversible scroll camera, real depth occlusion, measured loading and poster fallbacks.

items.name: depth-camera-scene
items.title: Depth Camera Scene · P0
items.description: Advanced 2.5D engine with a real PerspectiveCamera, registered or trimmed high-resolution planes, world focus-handoff effects, semantic DOM occlusion, reversible scroll and production fallbacks.

items.name: cinematic-world-scene
items.title: Cinematic World Scene · P0 Recipe
items.description: Optional Advanced recipe that composes DepthCameraScene with intro, rear/front narrative and a locally controlled final catalog.

items.name: spatial-product-stage
items.title: Spatial Product Stage · P1
items.description: Assembly and exploded-view stage for registered alpha plates, editable Three.js primitives or named GLB nodes, with hidden or exploded idle states and hover, scroll or hybrid drivers.

items.name: liquid-glass
items.title: Liquid Glass Surface + Nav · P2
items.description: Content-agnostic clear or regular adaptive glass surface and semantic morphing navigation dock with bounded pointer light and reduced-motion behavior.

items.name: shader-field
items.title: Shader Field · P3
items.description: Bounded reactive WebGL field with aurora, metaballs, contour and caustic modes, DPR caps, offscreen pause and context-loss fallback.

items.name: media-portal
items.title: Media Portal · P4
items.description: Behavior-only aperture that promotes any React media to a full-viewport beat through reversible scroll, hover or controlled progress.

items.name: spatial-gallery
items.title: Spatial Gallery · P5
items.description: A real-camera image tunnel driven by native vertical scroll with a native snap rail on mobile and reduced motion.

items.name: mesh-transition
items.title: Mesh Transition · P6
items.description: GPU image-to-image wave, fold or liquid transition with a clean moving seam, texture-aware DPR cap, overscan and reversible scroll, hover or controlled playback.

items.name: layered-depth
items.title: Scroll Depth Scene · Basic 2.5D
items.description: Basic 2.5D engine for an integrated master, registered occlusion matte and editable React text; use DepthCameraScene for the Advanced 00–50 stack.

items.name: cursor-ambient
items.title: Cursor Lens
items.description: Fine-pointer lens that reveals a second visual state without a central cursor dot and falls back safely on touch or reduced motion.

items.name: sticky-story
items.title: Sticky Story
items.description: Responsive chapter narrative with a persistent visual, safe fluid content gutters and reduced-motion-safe transitions.

items.name: horizontal-story-rail
items.title: Horizontal Story Rail
items.description: Pinned horizontal narrative driven by native vertical page scroll, with a measured track and reduced-motion list fallback.

items.name: horizontal-track
items.title: Controlled Horizontal Track
items.description: Measured horizontal track driven by an external normalized MotionValue, with per-item sizing and no built-in sticky policy.

items.name: image-sequence-scrub
items.title: Image Sequence Scrub
items.description: Canvas image sequence driven by native scroll with bounded preloading, responsive frames, poster fallback and reduced-motion handling.

items.name: mask-reveal
items.title: Mask Reveal
items.description: Directional or radial reveal between two editable React visuals with reversible scroll progression.

items.name: kinetic-type
items.title: Kinetic Type
items.description: Semantic word- or character-based display type driven by scroll with a static accessible fallback.

items.name: before-after
items.title: Before / After
items.description: Controlled or uncontrolled accessible comparison slider for two registered visuals.

items.name: expanding-media
items.title: Expanding Media
items.description: Scroll-driven editorial frame that expands an image or video to a full-viewport beat.

items.name: depth-gallery
items.title: Focus Depth Gallery
items.description: Deterministic DOM stack where the current frame lifts away to reveal the next, with a native swipe fallback.

items.name: cursor-magnetic
items.title: Magnetic Cursor Targets
items.description: Bounded fine-pointer proximity field for independently tuned magnetic targets, with static touch and reduced-motion behavior.

items.name: refractive-glass
items.title: True Refractive Glass
items.description: Image-aware WebGL lens with editable geometry, refraction, magnification and chromatic edge, plus static touch and reduced-motion behavior.

items.name: product-orbit
items.title: GLB Product Orbit
items.description: GLB-ready Three.js product viewer with drag and keyboard rotation, physical materials, projected semantic hotspots and production fallbacks.

items.name: particle-assembly
items.title: Particle Assembly
items.description: Image-matte point cloud that morphs between an editable scattered state and a recognizable target using scroll, hover or controlled progress.

items.name: typography-depth-tunnel
items.title: Typography Depth Tunnel
items.description: Semantic CSS 3D typography sequence with scroll or controlled progress and a linear narrow-screen and reduced-motion result.

items.name: spatial-canvas
items.title: Infinite Spatial Canvas
items.description: Semantic pan-and-zoom world for non-linear archives with drag, keyboard and explicit controls while preserving native page-wheel behavior.

items.name: volumetric-light-stage
items.title: Volumetric Light Stage
items.description: Image-backed procedural light shafts and haze with three editable emitters, bounded pointer influence and a production WebGL lifecycle.

items.name: slice-recompose
items.title: Slice & Recompose
items.description: High-resolution source rebuilt from editable image strips with scroll, hover or external progress and a fully assembled reduced-motion state.

items.name: film-strip-3d
items.title: 3D Film Strip
items.description: Continuous CSS 3D film strip with several visible frames, one scroll-driven focus point and a native mobile/reduced-motion rail.

items.name: elastic-image-grid
items.title: Elastic Image Grid
items.description: Semantic responsive grid with a bounded fine-pointer spring field and static coarse-pointer and reduced-motion behavior.

items.name: fluid-surface
items.title: Fluid Surface Cursor
items.description: Image-aware WebGL surface with dissipating pointer impulses, native cursor preservation, DPR cap, offscreen pause and static fallbacks.

items.name: scene-handoff
items.title: Scene Handoff
items.description: Continuous reversible transition between two live React scenes with depth, shutter and iris variants and a linear reduced-motion result.

items.name: shared-element-zoom
items.title: Shared Element Zoom
items.description: Grid-to-detail shared-element morph with dialog semantics, focus management, scroll lock and a reduced-motion fade.

items.name: draw-on-scroll
items.title: Draw On Scroll
items.description: Scroll-driven stroke drawing for inline SVG shapes with stagger control, pinned or viewport progress and a fully drawn reduced-motion state.

items.name: marquee-velocity
items.title: Marquee Velocity
items.description: Infinite marquee whose speed and direction react to scroll velocity, with seamless measurement, offscreen pause and a static reduced-motion strip.

items.name: variable-font-axis
items.title: Variable Font Axis
items.description: Variable-font axes driven by pointer proximity or scroll; real selectable text, cached measurements and an idle-stopping animation loop.

items.name: image-trail
items.title: Image Trail
items.description: Decaying pointer trail of image cards from a fixed WAAPI pool; decorative-only, with touch and reduced-motion rendering content statically.

items.name: route-transition
items.title: Route Transition
items.description: View Transitions API helpers for Next App Router: transition-wrapped navigation, shared element names and circular theme wipes, all with graceful fallback.

items.name: distortion-carousel
items.title: Distortion Carousel
items.description: Draggable WebGL image carousel with momentum, snap and velocity-driven bend/chromatic distortion; native snap rail on reduced motion or WebGL failure.

items.name: portal-crossing
items.title: Portal Crossing
items.description: A 3D portal into another world: an irregular, depth-undulating rim tube — textured half with the origin world, half with the destination — rushes forward from far in the deep on scroll, its stencil aperture reveals the second world, and a scroll-only dolly crosses the threshold into DOM arrival content.

items.name: physics-playground
items.title: Physics Playground
items.description: Dependency-free 2D physics stage: items drop with gravity, collide, and can be grabbed and tossed; sleeps at rest and pauses offscreen.

items.name: holo-card
items.title: Holo Card
items.description: Trading-card holographic tilt: damped 3D pointer tracking with rainbow foil and glare sweeps; fully static on touch and reduced motion.

items.name: reveal-stagger
items.title: Reveal Stagger
items.description: Viewport-entry choreography: staggered fade/rise/blur/clip/zoom items plus masked word/character text reveals; server markup and reduced motion render final state.

items.name: count-up
items.title: Count-Up
items.description: Viewport-triggered stat counter with Intl formatting, reserved layout, animated value changes and an instant final value for reduced motion and no-JS.

items.name: hover-preview-list
items.title: Hover Preview List
items.description: Editorial index list with a cursor-following media panel: damped follow, velocity tilt, crossfade between rows, keyboard anchoring and inline previews on touch.

items.name: text-scramble
items.title: Text Scramble
items.description: Terminal-style decode: characters resolve left-to-right through a glyph pool, with visible/hover/load triggers and phrase cycling; real text stays the accessible name.

items.name: spotlight-grid
items.title: Spotlight Grid
items.description: Cursor-lit bento cards: one pointer field drives per-card border rings and interior glows via CSS variables; static resting state on touch and reduced motion.

items.name: scroll-stack
items.title: Scroll Stack
items.description: Stacking cards: each card pins near the viewport top while the next slides over it, scaling and dimming the covered one; reversible and measurement-driven, plain list on reduced motion.

items.name: knockout-text
items.title: Knockout Text
items.description: Pinned four-beat knockout sequence: dark stage, type rises in, letters become transparent windows over a fixed image via SVG mask, then zoom through the letters into a full-bleed takeover; fully reversible.

items.name: intro-loader
items.title: Intro Loader
items.description: Once-per-session intro or controlled loading screen: counter tied to document readiness or external progress, active-gated hold, curtain exit, scroll lock and pre-paint skip for repeat visits and reduced motion.

items.name: ambient-particles
items.title: Ambient Particles
items.description: Decorative canvas atmosphere (dust, snow, embers, fireflies): soft glow sprites over three depth bands with coherent wind gusts, edge fade, resize reprojection, area-scaled caps and offscreen pause.

items.name: split-flap
items.title: Split-Flap
items.description: Split-flap departure board derived entirely from timestamps: glyph-wheel flips with column stagger on reveal and text change, shrink-to-fit sizing, tile styling; static text on reduced motion.
